title: elymus fragilis
intro: Elymus fragilis, also known as Fragile Wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elymus fragilis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Elymus fragilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
